SHORT NAME: PRDSRVID 

LONG NAME: PROD_SRVC_ID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 40 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: 

COMMENT: Field length expanded from 19 to 40 in 2025. The NDC is reported in an 11-digit format, which is 
divided into three sections. The first five digits indicate the labeler code for the manufacturer; the next 
four digits indicate the ingredient, strength, dosage form and route of administration; and the last two 
digits
